message:
refactor(session): simplify SQLite open to direct async, remove spawn+oneshot

src/session.rs:
- Replace the thread::spawn + oneshot::channel + block_on pattern in
  open_sqlite() with a direct async call to load_session().await.
  The old pattern spawned a dedicated thread, used
  futures::executor::block_on to run the async load inside the thread,
  then sent the result back via a oneshot channel — adding ~3 layers
  of indirection for no benefit since the caller is already in an
  async context. The new version is 18 lines instead of 35.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
